option_b_selection_basis.selected_direction: identity becomes its own governed subsystem
option_b_selection_basis.reason: Identity pressure now exceeds Battle Academy and extends into stamped, staff, prerelease, and Japanese-domain expansion lanes.
repo_evidence: docs/contracts/VERSION_VS_FINISH_CONTRACT_V1.md identifies stamped cards, prerelease/staff families, promo-vs-set releases, and Japanese edition differences as canonical version differences.
docs/playbooks/JUSTTCG_MAPPING_PLAYBOOK_V1.md records prerelease/staff and special-suffix families as true identity ambiguity lanes.
docs/audits/AUDIT_EBAY_MAPPING_L2.md and docs/audits/web_vault_contract_reuse_audit_v1.md show downstream systems and external mappings already anchor to card_prints.
docs/checkpoints/BATTLE_ACADEMY_PHASE6_CANON_PROMOTION_V1.md proves the current card_prints storage shape cannot lawfully store the BA 4D identity law directly.
